SQLLite.SQL: SELECT DISTINCT CO.CO_NUMBER AS "coNumber" , CO.ADMIN_COURT_CODE AS "AdminCourtCode" FROM CONSOLIDATED_ORDERS CO WHERE CO.CO_STATUS IN ('LIVE' ,'APPLN', 'SET ASIDE', 'SUSPENDED', 'DEBTR PAYNG') AND CO.REVIEW_DATE = TO_DATE (${param.reviewDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND CO.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = ${param.adminCourtCode}

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper edsAdmin cpSuper
